import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut p = 0
  mut neg = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut cur = ""
  mut has = false
  mut sign = 1
  while i <= n
    let c = if i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        b
      when None
        32
      end
    else
      32
    end
    let is_space = c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13
    if is_space
      if has
        match string.parse_int(cur)
        when Some(v)
          if v > 0
            p = p + v
          else if v < 0
            neg = neg + v
          end
        when None
        end
      end
      cur = ""
      has = false
      sign = 1
    else
      cur = cur + string.from_byte(c)
      has = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  let r = p - neg
  println("r=#{r}")
end
